attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.

events.description: 上半场开始。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match (Austria).

events.description: 比赛暂停。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 比赛恢复。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Riyad Mahrez (Algeria).

events.description: 里亚德·马赫雷斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Ibrahim Maza (Algeria) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 马塞尔·萨比策犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Xaver Schlager (Austria) left footed shot from outside the box is too high.

events.description: 泽维尔·施拉格射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ibrahim Maza (Algeria) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Houssem Aouar.

events.description: 易卜拉欣·马扎射门偏出。 侯赛姆·奥亚尔参与进攻。
马尔科·阿诺托维奇 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Aïssa Mandi (Algeria) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 马尔科·阿诺托维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Aïssa Mandi (Algeria).

events.description: 比赛暂停。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 比赛恢复。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Austria. Konrad Laimer is caught offside.

events.description: 奥地利越位。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.

events.description: 比赛暂停。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 比赛恢复。
马尔科·阿诺托维奇 进球

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Austria. Marko Arnautovic is caught offside.

events.description: 奥地利越位。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Rafik Belghali (Algeria) right footed shot from the right side of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Ibrahim Maza.

events.description: 拉菲克·贝尔加利射门偏出。 易卜拉欣·马扎参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ibrahim Maza (Algeria) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Nabil Bentaleb.

events.description: 易卜拉欣·马扎射门偏出。 纳比尔·本塔莱布参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Austria. Conceded by Jaouen Hadjam.

events.description: 奥地利获得角球。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Romano Schmid (Austria) right footed shot from outside the box is just a bit too high following a corner.

events.description: 罗马诺·施密德射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Austria. Marko Arnautovic is caught offside.

events.description: 奥地利越位。

qualifiers.espnText: Farès Chaïbi (Algeria) hits the right post with a left footed shot from outside the box. Assisted by Riyad Mahrez.

events.description: 法雷斯·沙伊比射门偏出。 里亚德·马赫雷斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Phillipp Mwene (Austria) right footed shot from the left side of the box misses to the left.

events.description: 姆韦内射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Riyad Mahrez (Algeria) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Nabil Bentaleb.

events.description: 里亚德·马赫雷斯射门被封堵。 纳比尔·本塔莱布参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Riyad Mahrez (Algeria) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 罗马诺·施密德犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Ibrahim Maza (Algeria) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Alexander Schlager (Austria). Assisted by Rafik Belghali with a headed pass.

events.description: 易卜拉欣·马扎射正。 拉菲克·贝尔加利参与进攻。
拉菲克·贝尔加利 进球

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Austria. Conceded by Riyad Mahrez.

events.description: 奥地利获得角球。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Nicolas Seiwald (Austria) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked.

events.description: 尼古拉斯·塞瓦尔德射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Oussama Benbot (Algeria) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 马尔科·阿诺托维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时4分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Algeria 1, Austria 1.

events.description: 上半场结束。
迈克尔·格雷戈里奇 登场，马尔科·阿诺托维奇 离场
保罗·万纳 登场，罗马诺·施密德 离场
弗洛里安·格里利奇 登场，泽维尔·施拉格 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins Algeria 1, Austria 1.

events.description: 下半场开始。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ramy Bensebaini (Algeria) left footed shot from more than 35 yards is too high.

events.description: 拉米·本塞拜尼射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Farès Chaïbi (Algeria) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Alexander Schlager (Austria). Assisted by Riyad Mahrez.

events.description: 法雷斯·沙伊比射正。 里亚德·马赫雷斯参与进攻。
马塞尔·萨比策 进球

qualifiers.espnText: Farès Chaïbi (Algeria) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: 弗洛里安·格里利奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Farès Chaïbi (Algeria) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Aïssa Mandi.

events.description: 法雷斯·沙伊比射门被封堵。 艾萨·曼迪参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Handball by Michael Gregoritsch (Austria).

events.description: 迈克尔·格雷戈里奇犯规。
里亚德·马赫雷斯 进球
凯文·丹索 登场，大卫·阿拉巴 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Houssem Aouar (Algeria).

events.description: 侯赛姆·奥亚尔犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Nicolas Seiwald (Austria) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Phillipp Mwene.

events.description: 尼古拉斯·塞瓦尔德射门偏出。 姆韦内参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Austria. Conceded by Rafik Belghali.

events.description: 奥地利获得角球。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Kevin Danso (Austria) header from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Marcel Sabitzer with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 凯文·丹索射门偏出。 马塞尔·萨比策参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.

events.description: 比赛暂停。
拉扬·阿伊特·努里 登场，哈万·哈贾姆 离场
齐内丁·贝莱德 登场，阿明·古伊里 离场
萨米尔·切尔吉 登场，拉菲克·贝尔加利 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 比赛恢复。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Rayan Aït-Nouri (Algeria).

events.description: 拉扬·阿伊特·努里犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Riyad Mahrez (Algeria) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: 弗洛里安·格里利奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Algeria. Zineddine Belaïd is caught offside.

events.description: 阿尔及利亚越位。
里亚德·马赫雷斯 进球
费雷斯·盖吉米斯 登场，侯赛姆·奥亚尔 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时4分钟。
莎莎·卡拉季奇 登场，菲利普·穆文尼 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Philipp Lienhart (Austria) left footed shot from the centre of the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Michael Gregoritsch.

events.description: 菲利普·林哈特射门偏出。 迈克尔·格雷戈里奇参与进攻。
莎莎·卡拉季奇 进球
全场结束

source.name: 懂球帝
source.note: 懂球帝公开比赛概览 tendencies.data；正值为主队攻势，负值为客队攻势。

summary.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口
summary.sourceNote: 历史记录来自懂球帝 App 公开全量球队赛历（含友谊赛），并以 FIFA 公开赛事接口交叉核验；每场均保留原始来源回链。

metadata.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口

source.licenseNotice: 赛程、比分、阵容、事件和榜单来自本地 FIFA 官方公开 JSON 快照；生产展示仍需确认 FIFA 条款和授权边界。
